hotel_name: Khách sạn Thanh Tâm (Khách Sạn Thanh Tâm)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The hotel said they won't be celebrating the New Year and didn't provide any information about the reservation, so the guests had to look for another place to stay. Irresponsible towards customers.

reviews.title: Rating for the hotel 8.3 out of 4 stars.
reviews.text: On the 1st of October, I booked a room at midnight to check in. I turned off the lights and checked the camera, yesss, there’s a camera in the bathroom, ladies, be careful! :)))) I can’t check out now because I already paid, so I'll just try to sleep until tomorrow :)))) Here’s a photo :))) a red dot with a video.
reviews.response:
Chào bạn,
Khách sạn không lắp camera trong phòng, vì nếu làm vậy chắc mở thêm chi nhánh… trong trại giam rồi bạn nha :))

Tụi mình tôn trọng riêng tư khách lưu trú, nên nếu bạn lo lắng, bạn hoàn toàn có thể hỏi trực tiếp lễ tân để được check chuyển phòng
Cảm ơn bạn đã chia sẻ cảm nhận 💗

reviews.title: Old dirty hotel
reviews.text: Initially, I was given a room on the first floor that was filled with the smell of cigarettes, and the lock couldn't be opened. Then they moved me to a room on the second floor, which had a slightly better smell. However, the electrical outlet was broken, the kettle's lid was loose, the hotel was old, damp, and dark. It felt very scary and cold, and I kept experiencing sleep paralysis during my nap, huhu. I hope the hotel improves.

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text: You get what you pay for. Pictures are deceiving. Dirty room.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: My room does not resemble the pictures. The room is not very clean, and there are even ants, with a somewhat unpleasant smell. The hotel is cramped, dark, and feels very stuffy, and the room is small with no windows. The door hinges are loose, and the soundproofing is very poor. I stayed for only one night and had to move immediately. With such a price, I find it not worth it; there's plenty of nearby hotels with much better quality for not much more money. I hope the hotel learns from this experience and makes improvements.
reviews.response:
Khách sạn xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian phản hồi.
Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi trải nghiệm lưu trú của Quý khách chưa được như mong đợi. Ý kiến của Quý khách là góp ý rất quan trọng để khách sạn nhìn nhận lại và cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ, đặc biệt về vấn đề vệ sinh phòng, mùi, không gian và trang thiết bị.
Chúng tôi xin ghi nhận toàn bộ phản hồi và sẽ rà soát, khắc phục trong thời gian sớm nhất. Rất mong có cơ hội được đón tiếp và phục vụ Quý khách tốt hơn trong những lần lưu trú sau.
Trân trọng cảm ơn.

reviews.title: Very nice hotel for a short stay.
reviews.text: I stayed for 1 night and enjoyed very much. Located in Go Vap and alot of street foods nearby. I recommend for solo traveller and couple.
reviews.response: Thank you for your kind review and for choosing our hotel. We’re very happy to know that you had a pleasant stay. We look forward to welcoming you again soon! 🌷

reviews.title: The location was very good for me.
reviews.text: This hotel was much better than other hotels that are expensive, dirty, and disgusting. I will use it again next time.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Okay, affordable, suitable for the price range.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is spacious, clean, and fully equipped, but the bed linens have stains resembling footprints. Initially, there was a smell of cigarette smoke in the room, but it dissipates after a while; however, guests should be discouraged from smoking in the room. The toilet water on the third floor is a bit weak, and to flush, one has to use the showerhead to supply water. Although the location is far from District 1 for sightseeing, there are many places nearby for dining and night strolls.
reviews.response: Cảm ơn bạn đã đánh giá. Chúng tôi sẽ tiếp tục cải thiện dịch vụ và mong được đón tiếp bạn lần sau. 🌷

reviews.title: Great for Families
reviews.text: Spacious rooms and helpful staff made extra beds easy. The area felt very safe for evening walks with our kids.

reviews.title: Easy check-in experience
reviews.text: Check-in was fast and efficient. As a solo traveler, I appreciated how smooth the process was, allowing me to settle in quickly without any delays.

reviews.title: I love this hotel
reviews.text: My stay on that hotel is superb, the place is so clean and quiet, the freebies, the staff, its all worth it. I highly recommend this place to stay when you are in go vap ho chi minh

reviews.title: 10 điểm
reviews.text: Ở giữa lòng Gò Vấp,  Sài Gòn mà phòng 200-250k thì chất lượng quá xuất sắc. Đầy đủ nội thất cần thiết.
reviews.response: Cảm ơn bạn đã dành thời gian đánh giá và tin tưởng lựa chọn khách sạn. Rất vui khi bạn hài lòng với trải nghiệm tại đây. Hẹn gặp bạn vào lần lưu trú tiếp theo nha 🌷

reviews.title: sex-hotel?
reviews.text:
für jeden dem es (wie uns) nicht bewusst ist- alle hotels in dieser gegend sind sex hotels. dementsprechende möbel stehen im zimmer, bei uns hing auch ein bild einer nackten dame. war den bildern nicht zu entnehmen. 
trotz vorheriger bitte um ein zimmer mit fenster wurde uns dies nicht ermöglicht. 
zimmer war sauber, abends kam aber der geruch von zigaretten: es stand auch ein aschenbecher im zimmer. 
nachts hörte man laute geräusche (wasserleitung etc, immerhin kein stöhnen)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
✅ comfortable bed
✅ clean sheets and towels
✅ clean bathroom with hot water
✅ kind staff
✅ nice area
✅ properly working ac

it checks all the boxes for me, great value for price as well
reviews.response: Thank you for your kind review and for choosing our hotel. We’re very happy to know that you had a pleasant stay. We look forward to welcoming you again soon! 🌷

reviews.title: good value
reviews.text: Fine stay for a night or two. Some rooms are obscure. Furniture lightly rusted of used. Warm water was problem. But fine for a short stay.
